name: Cucumber Oregon Hazelnut Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup roasted and chopped Oregon hazelnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all vegetables together in a large bowl.
2. Combine yogurt, cheese, salt, pepper, and Tabasco sauce in a separate small bowl.
3. Toss the vegetable mixture with the yogurt-cheese dressing.
4. Garnish with roasted hazelnuts before serving.
